# Agent Passport — Support

If you need help, please:

1. Read the [README](https://github.com/sachn-cs/agent-passport#readme) and
   the [docs/](https://github.com/sachn-cs/agent-passport/tree/master/docs).
2. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/sachn-cs/agent-passport/issues?q=is%3Aissue)
   for similar problems or questions.
3. If you cannot find an answer, open a new issue using the
   [Support question](https://github.com/sachn-cs/agent-passport/issues/new?template=question.md)
   template.

For security issues, see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) — do **not** file a
public issue.

## Community

- GitHub Discussions (recommended for design questions and proposals)
- Issue tracker (bugs, features, documentation improvements)
